title: [DISCONTINUED] Subjectively Correct
description: The correct way to play modded Minecraft, in my subjective opinion.
body:
> # Working on a new modpack
> ### I was planning on releasing what I had planned for 3.0, but something seems to have gone wrong when updating and most of my mods seem to be incompatible with each other :(
> It's out btw: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/iatj](https://modrinth.com/modpack/iatj)

![logo](https://kckarnige.github.io/res/tscm-banner.png)
#
**This modpack aims to make Minecraft feel better, no matter how you prefer to play! Whether you're a builder, a survivor, or someone looking for a fun hour with friends, you're sure to have a great time!**

**It is recommended to run this pack with at least 4GB of RAM on an at least mid-range laptop.**

**If you can run GMod with a hundred addons, you can run this pack with little to no issues. Tinker with the settings and find what works best for *your* computer.**

> If you enjoy this pack and would like to help me out finacially, consider donating to either my [CashApp](https://cash.app/$kckarnige) or you could [buy me a coffee](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kckarnige)!

This pack features mods like Progression Reborn, Better Combat, Marium's Soulslike Weaponry, SimplySkills, Dungeon Difficulty, Teralith, Nullscape, almost all of [YUNG's](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG) worldgen mods, Another Furniture, Blockus, and a ton more!

There's also some resource packs to help tie everything together, like:

- 3 custom panoramas to show off the pack in all it's beauty!
    - *Dark Oak and Spruce Wood options backgrounds ripped from Vanilla Tweaks*

- [Enhanced Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-boss-bars) by [Naku](https://modrinth.com/user/Naku)

- [Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/betterleaves) by [PandaDEV](https://modrinth.com/user/PandaDEV)

- [Vanilla+ Collections](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillacollections) by [bebebea_loste](https://modrinth.com/user/bebebea_loste) (Slightly Modified)

- A [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net) preset

- A few more that make the game feel much more comfortable, even while in the heat of battle!

**This pack also adds an easy-to-use way to play with friends thanks to [WAN Party](https://modrinth.com/mod/wan-party) and [OfflineSkins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/offlineskins-fabric)!**

This modpack also includes [Complimentary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined), pre-configured with [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches)!
